review_status_values.INHERITED_UNREVIEWED: No R1G/R1H row-level adjudication; fixed owner is carried forward without claiming fresh verification.
review_status_values.R1G_ADJUDICATED: R1G provenance/lifecycle/family classification applied; not a new R1H content review.
review_status_values.R1H_SCIENTIFIC_FAMILY_REVIEWED: R1G provenance axes retained and R1H scientific-family migration closure applied.

migration_review_status_values.FAMILY_REVIEW_REQUIRED: Provenance is adjudicated, but scientific-family migration review has not been performed; movement remains blocked.
migration_review_status_values.FAMILY_REVIEWED_BLOCKED: Scientific-family migration closure was reviewed and movement is blocked by an immutable family companion.
migration_review_status_values.IMMUTABLE_PATH: The stable identity is frozen at its current path.
migration_review_status_values.INHERITED_UNREVIEWED: No current migration review; inherited fixed-snapshot classification is not promoted.

semantics.fixed_snapshot_owner: Exact R1C ROOT_OWNERSHIP.tsv primary_owner for the stable original identity.
semantics.fixed_snapshot_evidence: Exact R1C ROOT_OWNERSHIP.tsv ownership_evidence for the stable original identity.
semantics.effective_primary_owner: R1G owner for overridden identities; otherwise the explicitly unreviewed inherited fixed owner.
semantics.path_migration_safety: R1H closure ruling for the 32 B02/B03 candidates; BLOCKED_SCIENTIFIC_FAMILY_REVIEW_REQUIRED for the 101 provenance-adjudicated rows lacking family review; immutable path retention for the one frozen row; and an INHERITED_UNREVIEWED-prefixed fixed readiness otherwise.
semantics.migration_review_status: Independent review axis preventing provenance adjudication from being mistaken for migration-family review or move authority.
semantics.adjudication_source: Names the exact evidence layer used; it does not upgrade unaffected rows.
semantics.review_status: Mandatory anti-inflation stamp. INHERITED_UNREVIEWED is not an adjudication.
